articles.title: Analyst Michaël van de Poppe Unveils Altcoin Picks, Says He’s Bullish on Ethereum and Three ETH Rivals
articles.description: A widely followed crypto strategist is unveiling his top altcoin picks amid the crypto pullback, which includes Ethereum (ETH) and three of its challengers. Michaël van de Poppe tells his 611,800 Twitter followers that he is positioned for huge rallies in smart contract platforms Ethereum, Cardano (ADA), Avalanche (AVAX) and Fantom (FTM), as well as […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Derivatives Exchange Reserve Surges Up As BTC Continues To Plunge
articles.description: On-chain data shows the Bitcoin reserve of derivative exchanges has surged up recently as the price of the crypto has continued to crash down. Bitcoin Derivatives Exchange Reserve Observes Sharp Uptrend As explained by an analyst in a CryptoQuant post, the crashing BTC price may be forcing whales and long-term holders to open short positions in order to hedge their portfolios. The “derivative...

articles.title: Alameda Research lends Voyager Digital 200M USDC and 15k Bitcoin to Safeguard Customer Assets During the Bear Market
articles.description: Key takeaways: Sam Bankman-Fried’s Alameda Research has lent Voyager digital 200 million USDC and 15k Bitcoin. The digital assets are meant to safeguard Voyager Digital’s customers’ assets during the current crypto market volatility. The term sheet between Alameda Research and Voyager Digital provides a revolving term of credit facilities expiring December 2024 with an annual interest rate of 5%....

articles.title: Solend Team Proposes to ‘Take Over’ a Solana Whale Account Facing Liquidation That Could Affect the DEX’s Liquidity
articles.description: Summary: The team at Solend is concerned that a Solana whale might be liquidated, causing a cascade of liquidations that would hurt the platform’s liquidity. The Solend team has attempted to contact the SOL whale to no avail. They have since proposed to grant Solend Labs emergency power to temporarily take over the account so that the liquidation can be executed through an OTC trade, safeguarding...

articles.title: Stop Looking at the BTC Chart, Your Bitcoin Investment is Safe and Will Grow After the Bear Market, Says President Bukele
articles.description: Key takeaways: El Salvador’s President Nayib Bukele has advised crypto traders to stop looking at the Bitcoin chart and enjoy life. President Bukele also reassured Bitcoin holders that their investment is safe and its value will immensely grow after the bear market. According to Bitcoin Treasuries, President Bukuele’s Bitcoin purchase on behalf of El Salvador is currently at 62.2% in unrealized...

articles.title: Do Kwon and Terraform Labs Sued for Misleading Investors
articles.description: The Terra collapse continues to make headlines with a new lawsuit against the firm, founders, and VCs in the US.

articles.title: SafeMoon loses almost 80% of its value in 2022 despite V2 migration

articles.title: Dogecoin Pumps By Over 10% On Elon Musk’s Tweets That He’ll Keep Supporting and Buying DOGE
articles.description: Summary: Dogecoin has pumped by over 10% after Elon Musk tweeted that he will keep supporting DOGE. In a follow-up Tweet, Elon Musk said he would keep buying Dogecoin. Elon Musk, Tesla, and SpaceX are facing a $258 billion lawsuit for promoting a Dogecoin ‘pyramid scheme’. The popular meme-coin of Dogecoin (DOGE) has experienced a knee-jerk reaction after the CEO of Tesla and Founder of SpaceX,...

articles.title: DOGE shoots up as Elon Musk affirms he’s accumulating Dogecoin
articles.description: Meme cryptocurrency Dogecoin has put aside the ongoing market correction to trade in the green zone after Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA)... Continue reading

articles.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Pledges Support for Dogeoin, Says He Is Buying $DOGE
articles.description: On Sunday (June 19), Tesla and Space X CEO Elon Musk voiced his support for popular meme-based cryptocurrency Dogecoin, helping it to become the top percentage gainer amongst the top 10 cryptoassets in the past 24 hours. Dogecoin was initially released on 6 December 2013, as a “fun and friendly internet currency.” It was created by Billy Markus […]

articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Hammered Down To $950 As Crypto Selloff Deepens
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) has fallen below $1,000 for the first time in more than a year as the broader crypto market continues to slide south with no quick remedy in sight, or at least not yet. Ether (ETH) was one of the cryptocurrencies that performed particularly poorly, falling 7.32 percent over the past day to follow Bitcoin’s loss. The second largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization is...

articles.title: Tether confirms DDOS attack on tether.io
articles.description: Tether CTO, Paolo Ardoino, has confirmed that the Tether website, tether.io, is currently suffering a DDOS attack.
